title: Modern Mods
description: Modern Mods is a Modpack with how we call it „modern“ mods, mods that are designed more blocky and closer to Minecrafts art style. Good examples are Create, Ars Nouvea, Ad Astra and many more.
body:
# Modern Mods
![Modern Mods 0.2 BETA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49bdf3103848f13e4959a14290bdf1ec3cda1f9b.png)
### Modern Mods is a Modpack with how we call it „modern“ mods that are designed more blocky andfit better in the game. Good examples of this are Create, Ars Nouvea, Ad Astra and many more.

## Features:

### Content Mods:

🚀 AdAstra (v.1.12.7)

🧙‍♂️ ArsNouveau (v.3.22.3)

⚙️ Create (v.0.5.1.f)

🥗 Farmer's Delight (v.1.2.4)

🐔 More Mob Variants (v.1.3.0)

🦁 Naturalist (v.4.0.3)

🐠 Ocean's Delight (v.1.0.2)

🛠️ Quark (v.3.4-418)

⚖️ Clockwork (v.0.1.16)

🛩️ Valkyrien Skies (v.2.1.2-beta.1)

### Addons:

🔩 Create Crafts & Additions (v.1.2.2)

🔩 Create Stuff & Additions (v.2.0.4.)

🍴 Create: Slice & Dice (v.2.3.2)

⛽ Create: Diesel Generators (v.1.2h)

🪄 Create Enchantment Industry (v.1.2.9.e)

🥣 Create Central Kitchen (v.1.3.11.c)

🚀 Create Ad Astra Compat (v.1.0.3)

⚙️ Create: Extended Cogwheels (v.2.1.1)

🔩 Create: Misc and Things (v.4.0A)

🚂 Create: Steam 'n' Rails (v.1.6.4)

👆 Create: Interactive (v.1.0.1-beta.3)


### Tweaks:

🍎 AppleSkin (v.2.4.2)

🌄 Complemantary Shader Reimagined (v.r5.1.1)

📁 Just Enough Items (v.11.6.0.1019)

👀 Oculus (v.1.6.9)

🗺️ Xaero's Mini- and Worldmap (v.24.2.0 | v.1.38.8)

🎙️ Simple Voice Chat (v.2.5.15) [for MP]

## Soon:

### Content Mods:

📃 FTB Quests

### Tweaks:

👥 FTB Teams
📖 FTB Libary

## Links & Stuff:

### Shortcuts:

📃 (NQ = No Quest version)
